# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/deep/klokwork/my-workspace/Anne-Aria/build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Application Binary Directory
APPLICATION_BINARY_DIR:PATH=/home/deep/klokwork/my-workspace/Anne-Aria/build

//Application Source Directory

//Selected board
BOARD:STRING=anne_aria_cpuapp@3_0_0

//Path to a file.
BOARD_DIR:PATH=/home/deep/klokwork/my-workspace/boards/arm/anne_aria

//Support board extensions
BOARD_EXTENSIONS:BOOL=ON

//Path to a program.
BOSSAC:FILEPATH=/home/deep/zephyr-sdk-0.17.0/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/bossac

//Kernel binary file
BYPRODUCT_KERNEL_BIN_NAME:FILEPATH=/home/deep/klokwork/my-workspace/Anne-Aria/build/zephyr/zephyr.bin

//Kernel elf file
BYPRODUCT_KERNEL_ELF_NAME:FILEPATH=/home/deep/klokwork/my-workspace/Anne-Aria/build/zephyr/zephyr.elf

//Kernel hex file
BYPRODUCT_KERNEL_HEX_NAME:FILEPATH=/home/deep/klokwork/my-workspace/Anne-Aria/build/zephyr/zephyr.hex

//Selected board
CACHED_BOARD:STRING=anne_aria_cpuapp@3_0_0

//If desired, you can build the application usingthe configuration
// settings specified in an alternate .conf file using this parameter.
// These settings will override the settings in the application’s
// .config file or its default .conf file.Multiple files may be
// listed, e.g. CONF_FILE="prj1.conf;prj2.conf" The CACHED_CONF_FILE
// is internal Zephyr variable used between CMake runs. To change
// CONF_FILE, use the CONF_FILE variable.
CACHED_CONF_FILE:STRING=/home/deep/klokwork/my-workspace/Anne-Aria/app/prj_evt2.conf

//Selected shield
CACHED_SHIELD:STRING=

//Selected snippet
CACHED_SNIPPET:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CCACHE_FOUND:FILEPATH=CCACHE_FOUND-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/home/deep/zephyr-sdk-0.17.0/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/arm-zephyr-eabi-addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/home/deep/zephyr-sdk-0.17.0/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/arm-zephyr-eabi-ar

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AS:FILEPATH=/home/deep/zephyr-sdk-0.17.0/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/arm-zephyr-eabi-as

//ASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/home/deep/zephyr-sdk-0.17.0/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/arm-zephyr-eabi-gcc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/home/deep/zephyr-sdk-0.17.0/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/arm-zephyr-eabi-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/home/deep/zephyr-sdk-0.17.0/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/arm-zephyr-eabi-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=

//CXX compiler

FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_Python3:INTERNAL=[/home/deep/klokwork/west-venv/bin/python3.12][cfound components: Interpreter ][v3.12.8()]
//ADVANCED property for variable: GIT_EXECUTABLE
GIT_EXECUTABLE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Have include fcntl.h
HAVE_FCNTL_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include stdatomic.h
HAVE_STDATOMIC_H:INTERNAL=1
//STRINGS property for variable: RELEASE_TYPE
RELEASE_TYPE-STRINGS:INTERNAL=ALPHA;BETA;FINAL;FEATURE

//West
